title: Set a valid player name and access the game list
description: Verifies a new player can enter a non-empty name and reach the list of available games with the name associated to the session.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill PlayerOne into the player name field
Submit the player name
Verify the available games list is displayed
Verify the player name is shown as set for the current session

title: Girl Game posts a score that appears on the Girl leaderboard tab
description: Verifies completing the Girl Game results in an entry on the Girl Game leaderboard for the current player name.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill GirlLeaderboardUser into the player name field
Submit the player name
Navigate to /games/girl
Continue revealing circles until the round completes
Navigate to /leaderboard
Select the Girl Game leaderboard tab
Verify an entry for GirlLeaderboardUser is displayed on the Girl Game leaderboard
Verify the Girl Game leaderboard shows a click-count metric for entries

title: Start Girl Game from a named session
description: Verifies a player who has set a name can enter the Girl Game and see the expected initial game UI for a new round.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill GirlRunner into the player name field
Submit the player name
Navigate to /games/girl
Verify a grid of 20 clickable circles is displayed
Verify the click count indicator is displayed

title: Switch between game scoreboards
description: Verifies a player can open the leaderboard and switch between Girl Game and Balloon Game scoreboards to view each list of scores.

steps.description: Navigate to /leaderboard
Select the Girl Game scoreboard view
Select the Balloon Game scoreboard view
Verify Balloon Game scores and their metrics are displayed

title: View leaderboard and switch between Girl and Balloon tabs
description: Verifies a player can open the leaderboard and toggle between Girl Game and Balloon Game scoreboards successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /leaderboard
Select the Girl Game leaderboard tab
Select the Balloon Game leaderboard tab
Verify a scoreboard list is displayed for the selected game
Verify switching tabs updates the displayed scoreboard content

title: Start Balloon Game and see initial row with attempts
description: Verifies a player who has set a name can enter the Balloon Game and see a row of 10 balloons with an attempts indicator.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill BalloonRunner into the player name field
Submit the player name
Navigate to /games/balloon
Verify a row of 10 face-down balloons is displayed
Verify an attempts indicator for the current row is displayed

title: Balloon Game consumes attempts and ends after 5 attempts without a match
description: Verifies the Balloon Game decrements attempts with reveals and ends the game when a row reaches the attempt limit without a match.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill BalloonFailer into the player name field
Submit the player name
Navigate to /games/balloon
Reveal balloons until the row reaches the maximum attempts without matching
Verify an end-of-game summary is displayed
Verify gameplay no longer allows continuing the row after the attempt limit is reached

title: Girl Game click increments and round completion prevents further interaction
description: Verifies clicking circles increments the click count and that after the game completes, further circle interactions no longer change the score state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill GirlCompleter into the player name field
Submit the player name
Navigate to /games/girl
Click a circle to reveal it
Click a different circle to reveal it
Continue revealing circles until the round completes
Click a circle after completion
Verify a final score or completion summary is displayed
Verify further interaction does not continue normal gameplay after completion

title: Persist player name across refresh and route navigation
description: Verifies a returning player’s name persists locally across page refresh and navigating to other routes, and remains available when starting a game.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill PersistentPlayer into the player name field
Submit the player name
Navigate to /leaderboard
Navigate to /howtoplay
Navigate to /
Wait for the page to finish reloading
Verify the player name is still shown as set for the current session
Verify the available games list is displayed

title: From How to Play, navigate to Girl Game to start playing
description: Verifies a player can move from the instructions page into the Girl Game to begin the gameplay experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /howtoplay
Click the link to play the Girl Game
Verify the Girl Game play area is displayed

title: How To Play shows rules and allows navigation into each game
description: Verifies the How To Play page renders rules and a comparison table and the user can proceed into both games from it.

steps.description: Navigate to /howtoplay
Verify gameplay rules and tips are displayed
Verify a comparison table for the two games is displayed
Click the control to start the Girl Game from How To Play
Navigate to /howtoplay
Click the control to start the Balloon Game from How To Play
Verify the Balloon Game play area is displayed

title: How to Play content loads with rules and comparison table
description: Verifies a player can read both games’ rules/tips and see a comparison table on the instructions page.

steps.description: Navigate to /howtoplay
Verify step-by-step instructions for both games are displayed
Verify a comparison table of the two games is displayed

title: Leaderboard ordering reflects best-score direction per game
description: Verifies the leaderboard sorts Girl scores with lower clicks ranked better and Balloon scores with higher rows ranked better using two scores created in-session.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill SortTester into the player name field
Submit the player name
Navigate to /games/girl
Complete a round with more clicks by continuing to click extra circles before finding the final head
Navigate to /games/girl
Complete a round aiming for fewer total clicks
Navigate to /leaderboard
Select the Girl Game leaderboard tab
Verify the better Girl score (fewer clicks) is ranked above the worse Girl score for the same player

title: Leaderboard shows correct metric direction per game
description: Verifies the leaderboard presents the appropriate metric context for each game (click-based for Girl Game and rows-passed for Balloon Game).

steps.description: Navigate to /leaderboard
Select the Girl Game scoreboard view
Select the Balloon Game scoreboard view
Verify the Balloon Game scoreboard displays a rows-passed style metric rather than a click-count style metric

title: Reject empty player name
description: Verifies submitting an empty player name shows a validation error and does not proceed to gameplay choices.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill  into the player name field
Submit the player name
Verify a name validation error is visible
Verify the available games list is not displayed

title: Leaderboard supports rapid tab switching without breaking the view
description: Verifies switching between Girl Game and Balloon Game tabs multiple times keeps the leaderboard usable and shows a scoreboard each time.

steps.description: Navigate to /leaderboard
Select the Girl Game scoreboard view
Select the Balloon Game scoreboard view
Select the Girl Game scoreboard view
Select the Balloon Game scoreboard view
Verify a scoreboard list is still displayed after repeated switching

title: Accept long and special-character player name
description: Verifies the app accepts a long name with special characters and still allows access to the game list without UI blocking validation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill Player_测试-Name-1234567890-ExtraLong into the player name field
Submit the player name
Verify the available games list is displayed
Verify the player name is shown as set for the current session

title: Leaderboard renders a stable empty state when no scores are available
description: Verifies that if a scoreboard has no rows to display, the page shows a clear empty state instead of crashing or rendering broken UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /leaderboard
Select the Girl Game scoreboard view
Verify either a list of scores is displayed or an empty state message is visible

title: Deep-link to Girl Game without setting a name
description: Verifies opening the Girl Game directly without a player name does not crash and the user is guided to set a name before scoring gameplay.

steps.description: Navigate to /games/girl
Click a circle to attempt to play
Verify the app remains stable without crashing
Verify the user is prompted or redirected to set a player name before proceeding

title: Admin placeholder page renders without crashing
description: Verifies the admin/maintainer can visit the admin route and see a stable placeholder page rendered.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Verify an admin placeholder view is displayed
Verify the page renders without a blank screen or crash
